title: Dirtmonds
body:
**DIRTMONDS**

**![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/CottonMC/Vivatech/master/docs/fabric_badge.png)**

[![](https://cf.way2muchnoise.eu/versions/dirtmonds.svg)![](https://cf.way2muchnoise.eu/full_dirtmonds_downloads.svg)![](https://img.shields.io/github/downloads/dmcpacks/Dirtmonds-Fabric/total?color=green&label=Github%20downloads&style=plastic)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dirtmonds/files)[![](https://img.shields.io/discord/805896404856733771?label=Discord&style=plastic)![](https://img.shields.io/github/languages/code-size/dmcpacks/Dirtmonds-Fabric?style=plastic)](https://discord.gg/ew8kSgxj2U)

Have **YOU** ever wanted to have dirtmonds in minecraft? no? well anyways heres a mod that adds dirtmonds to Minecraft.

 

Keep in mind that already generated terrain/chunks will **NOT** contain dirtmonds since the mod does not edit pre-existing chunks, to find dirtmonds you would need to explore until you find new chunks.

Works for both client and server with the same .jar

 

**FAQ**

 Can I use this on a modpack?  
Yes  
  
Can I use this as a base for my mod?  
Yes but the mod you make should be open source  
  
What do I do if I add compatibility for my mod?  
Let me know by dming me on discord with your mods link and I'll add you project to the list.  
  
Forge version?  
**NO**
